originalTitle: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
title: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
content: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.

originalTitle: Senegal bans ministers from foreign travel as oil price rise bites
title: Senegal bans ministers from foreign travel as oil price rise bites
content: The fuel cost is nearly double what the government budgeted for putting pressure on stretched finances.

originalTitle: 'We want a voice in our land' - the people evicted to build Nigeria's capital
title: 'We want a voice in our land' - the people evicted to build Nigeria's capital
content: People evicted to build Nigeria's capital accuse the government of failing to fulfill its promises to them.

originalTitle: Trump offers no concrete plan as Strait of Hormuz closure shocks Europe
title: Trump offers no concrete plan as Strait of Hormuz closure shocks Europe
content: Economist James Meadway says US President Donald Trump offers threats but no clear plan to end the crisis.

originalTitle: Iran’s ex-FM Zarif proposes peace roadmap; Gulf points at erosion of trust
title: Iran’s ex-FM Zarif proposes peace roadmap; Gulf points at erosion of trust
content: Zarif’s plan calls for limits on Iran’s nuclear programme and reopening Strait of Hormuz in return for end to sanctions.

originalTitle: Italian PM says the Gulf is ‘fundamental’ for Europe’s security
title: Italian PM says the Gulf is ‘fundamental’ for Europe’s security
content: In a visit to the GulfItalian PM Meloni emphasized the importance of the region to Italian and European security.

originalTitle: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
title: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
content: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

originalTitle: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
title: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
content: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.

originalTitle: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
title: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
content: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.

originalTitle: Liverpool 'gave up' in FA Cup exit - Van Dijk
title: Liverpool 'gave up' in FA Cup exit - Van Dijk
content: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk apologises to the supporters and says his side "gave up" during their 4-0 FA Cup quarter-final defeat by Manchester City.

originalTitle: Survival or FA Cup glory - which would you choose?
title: Survival or FA Cup glory - which would you choose?
content: Leeds visit West Ham on Sunday in the FA Cup quarter-finals but both are also in a relegation scrap. Would you risk safety for glory?

originalTitle: Is the Championship heading for financial 'catastrophe'?
title: Is the Championship heading for financial 'catastrophe'?
content: BBC Sport takes a look at if the second tier could be facing a "doomsday scenario" as club accounts reveal the significant scale of their losses.
